sentence: 公司为所有雇员提供医疗保险。
pinyin: Gōngsī wèi suǒyǒu gùyuán tígōng yīliáo bǎoxiǎn.
english: The company provides health insurance for all employees.

meaning: capital city of an autonomous region
sentence: 拉萨是西藏自治区的首府。
pinyin: Lāsà shì Xīzàng Zìzhìqū de shǒufǔ.
english: Lhasa is the capital of the Tibet Autonomous Region.

sentence: 首批志愿者已经抵达灾区。
pinyin: Shǒu pī zhìyuànzhě yǐjīng dǐdá zāiqū.
english: The first batch of volunteers has already arrived in the disaster area.

sentence: 太阳是距离地球最近的恒星。
pinyin: Tàiyáng shì jùlí dìqiú zuì jìn de héngxīng.
english: The sun is the nearest star to Earth.

sentence: 政府向灾区拨款用于重建工作。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ xiàng zāiqū bōkuǎn yòng yú chóngjiàn gōngzuò.
english: The government allocated funds to the disaster area for reconstruction.

sentence: 我去税务局办了一张发票。
pinyin: Wǒ qù shuìwù jú bàn le yī zhāng fāpiào.
english: I went to the tax office to get an invoice.

sentence: 这家工厂正在改制，变成股份公司。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngchǎng zhèngzài gǎizhì, biànchéng gǔfèn gōngsī.
english: This factory is being restructured into a joint-stock company.

sentence: 海南的旅游业每年都在增长。
pinyin: Hǎinán de lǚyóuyè měi nián dōu zài zēngzhǎng.
english: Hainan's tourism industry grows every year.

sentence: 这个地区矿产资源非常丰富。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū kuàngchǎn zīyuán fēicháng fēngfù.
english: This region is very rich in mineral resources.

meaning: be lost in thought; entranced; preoccupation; Trance (music genre)
sentence: 她盯着窗外出神，没听见我说话。
pinyin: Tā dīngzhe chuāng wài chūshén, méi tīngjiàn wǒ shuōhuà.
english: She stared out the window lost in thought and didn't hear me.

sentence: 鸟类是由恐龙演化而来的。
pinyin: Niǎolèi shì yóu kǒnglóng yǎnhuà ér lái de.
english: Birds evolved from dinosaurs.

sentence: 他在大学里学的是光学专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué lǐ xué de shì guāngxué zhuānyè.
english: He majored in optics at university.

sentence: 这台电脑只有两个USB接口。
pinyin: Zhè tái diànnǎo zhǐyǒu liǎng gè USB jiēkǒu.
english: This computer only has two USB ports.

sentence: 小猫嗅了嗅奶子就开始喝奶。
pinyin: Xiǎo māo xiù le xiù nǎizi jiù kāishǐ hē nǎi.
english: The kitten sniffed the milk and then started drinking.

sentence: 春天到了，满园如花，美不胜收。
pinyin: Chūntiān dào le, mǎn yuán rú huā, měi bù shèng shōu.
english: Spring has arrived; the whole garden is in bloom and breathtakingly beautiful.

sentence: 公司的销售额稳步上升。
pinyin: Gōngsī de xiāoshòu'é wěnbù shàngshēng.
english: The company's sales are rising steadily.

sentence: 相较于去年，今年夏天更热。
pinyin: Xiāngjiào yú qùnián, jīnnián xiàtiān gèng rè.
english: Compared to last year, this summer is even hotter.

meaning: 1. inch (unit of length equal to 2.54 cm.)
sentence: 这块屏幕是十五英寸的。
pinyin: Zhè kuài píngmù shì shíwǔ yīngcùn de.
english: This screen is fifteen inches.

sentence: 最新民调显示他的支持率下降了。
pinyin: Zuìxīn míndiào xiǎnshì tā de zhīchí lǜ xiàjiàng le.
english: The latest poll shows his approval rating has dropped.

sentence: 他花了三年时间整理这批史料。
pinyin: Tā huā le sān nián shí jiān zhěng lǐ zhè pī shǐ liào.
english: He spent three years organizing this collection of historical materials.

sentence: 把蔬菜放入锅中煮五分钟。
pinyin: Bǎ shū cài fàng rù guō zhōng zhǔ wǔ fēn zhōng.
english: Put the vegetables into the pot and cook for five minutes.

meaning: police officer; policeman (general term for any police officer); polic
sentence: 一名警员正在路口指挥交通。
pinyin: Yī míng jǐng yuán zhèng zài lù kǒu zhǐ huī jiāo tōng.
english: A police officer is directing traffic at the intersection.

sentence: 他气得直骂那个狗东西。
pinyin: Tā qì de zhí mà nà gè gǒu dōng xī.
english: He was so angry he kept cursing that scoundrel.

sentence: 协会在各城市设立了分会。
pinyin: Xié huì zài gè chéng shì shè lì le fēn huì.
english: The association has set up branches in various cities.

sentence: 这条干线每天运输大量货物。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo gàn xiàn měi tiān yùn shū dà liàng huò wù.
english: This main line transports a large amount of goods every day.

sentence: 历史书上记载了这位相国的事迹。
pinyin: Lì shǐ shū shàng jì zǎi le zhè wèi xiàng guó de shì jì.
english: The history book records the deeds of this prime minister.

sentence: 他喜欢看推理小说。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān kàn tuīlǐ xiǎoshuō.
english: He enjoys reading mystery and detective novels.

sentence: 活动的后勤工作由小李负责。
pinyin: Huódòng de hòuqín gōngzuò yóu Xiǎo Lǐ fùzé.
english: Xiao Li is in charge of the logistics for the event.

sentence: 他第一次去听歌剧，觉得非常震撼。
pinyin: Tā dì yī cì qù tīng gē jù, jué de fēi cháng zhèn hàn.
english: He went to see an opera for the first time and found it incredibly moving.

meaning: 1. to come and go; 2. to have dealings with; 3. to be in relation with
sentence: 搬家之后我们还是经常来往。
pinyin: Bān jiā zhī hòu wǒ men hái shì jīng cháng lái wǎng.
english: Even after moving, we still keep in regular contact with each other.

sentence: 今天会议的议程已经发给大家了。
pinyin: Jīntiān huìyì de yì chéng yǐjīng fā gěi dàjiā le.
english: Today's meeting agenda has already been sent to everyone.

sentence: 钱包里头有几张卡。
pinyin: Qiánbāo lǐtou yǒu jǐ zhāng kǎ.
english: There are a few cards inside the wallet.

meaning: 1. to raise money; 2. to accumulate funds
sentence: 他们通过众筹集资买了新设备。
pinyin: Tāmen tōngguò zhòngchóu jízī mǎi le xīn shèbèi.
english: They raised money through crowdfunding to buy new equipment.

sentence: 他分享了对新项目的初步构想。
pinyin: Tā fēn xiǎng le duì xīn xiàng mù de chū bù gòu xiǎng.
english: He shared his initial concept for the new project.

sentence: 这篇文章抨击了当前的食品安全问题。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng pēngjī le dāngqián de shípǐn ānquán wèntí.
english: This article attacked the current food safety issues.

sentence: 医生说他的血管里有一处堵塞。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō tā de xuèguǎn lǐ yǒu yī chù dǔsè.
english: The doctor said there is a blockage in his blood vessel.

sentence: 老师用多媒体课件上课，很生动。
pinyin: Lǎoshī yòng duōméitǐ kèjiàn shàngkè, hěn shēngdòng.
english: The teacher used multimedia slides in class; it was very engaging.

meaning: 1. abbr. for 期貨合約|期货合约[qī huò hé yuē], futures contract (finance)
sentence: 他在做大豆期货，风险不小。
pinyin: Tā zài zuò dàdòu qīhuò, fēngxiǎn bù xiǎo.
english: He is trading soybean futures, which carries considerable risk.

sentence: 北京位于东经一百一十六度经线附近。
pinyin: Běijīng wèiyú dōng jīng yībǎi yīshíliù dù jīngxiàn fùjìn.
english: Beijing is located near the 116° east meridian.

sentence: 她每天出门前都要用化妆品。
pinyin: Tā měitiān chūmén qián dōu yào yòng huàzhuāngpǐn.
english: She puts on cosmetics every day before going out.

sentence: 换了新引擎后，汽车的效能提高了很多。
pinyin: Huàn le xīn yǐnqíng hòu, qìchē de xiàonéng tígāo le hěn duō.
english: After replacing the engine, the car's performance improved a lot.

sentence: 我的电脑需要重新安装操作系统。
pinyin: Wǒ de diànnǎo xūyào chóngxīn ānzhuāng cāozuò xìtǒng.
english: My computer needs to have its operating system reinstalled.

sentence: 警方已经锁定了一名嫌疑人。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng yǐjīng suǒdìng le yī míng xiányírén.
english: The police have already identified a suspect.

sentence: 一名五岁女童在公园里走失了。
pinyin: Yī míng wǔ suì nǚtóng zài gōngyuán lǐ zǒushī le.
english: A five-year-old girl got lost in the park.

sentence: 公司今年打算雇用十名新员工。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián dǎsuàn gùyòng shí míng xīn yuángōng.
english: The company plans to hire ten new employees this year.

sentence: 她每晚睡前都会祷告。
pinyin: Tā měi wǎn shuì qián dōu huì dǎogào.
english: She prays every night before going to sleep.

sentence: 历史书里记录了许多独裁者的故事。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shū lǐ jìlù le xǔduō dúcáizhě de gùshi.
english: History books record the stories of many dictators.

meaning: 1. reputation; 2. profile; 3. familiarity in the public consciousness
sentence: 这个品牌的知名度在年轻人中很高。
pinyin: Zhège pǐnpái de zhīmíngdù zài niánqīngrén zhōng hěn gāo.
english: This brand has very high name recognition among young people.

sentence: 我们直接联系了手机制造商。
pinyin: Wǒmen zhíjiē liánxì le shǒujī zhìzàoshāng.
english: We contacted the phone manufacturer directly.

sentence: 我订阅了一个学英语的频道。
pinyin: Wǒ dìngyuè le yī gè xué Yīngyǔ de píndào.
english: I subscribed to a channel for learning English.
